sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113520" key="xeilopote/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χειλο-ποτέω</orth>, <sense id="n113520.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drink with the lips, sip,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.223</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Thyill.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
